summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Perimeter, Area and Volume in mathematics.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 7 mathematics explains the core concepts of Perimeter, Area and Volume. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
